title: Mino++
description: Recreation of a certain popular card game in Minecraft!
body:
Mino++

Recreating a certain popular card game in Minecraft

![Gameplay from third-person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QitwNm0/images/ea7bcccf41d2193b793c9a90376764aa047987df.png) Wouldn't it be a shame when you met up with your best friends online, but stranded with no card games to play? Mino++ aims to resolve this issue in a Minecraft-y way. We also provide you with virtual friends whenever organic counterparts of yours happened to be unavailable! ## Gameplay Place down a Mino++ table, and right click it to join. ![Gameplay in first-person view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4QitwNm0/images/11e9c2b5faea2afb747ee325481f861daae0e675.png) We'll skip the rules - See online resources like [THIS](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uno_(card_game)) for that! - Use scroll wheel to select a card - Right-click on the table to play a card - Or, right-click on the pile to draw a card - To shout "Mino!", either hold down LCTRL while playing a card when you have two cards remaining (i.e. shouting simultaneously while playing) - Should you forget that, you can also type "mino" in the chat after playing a card - If you find your opponent forgot to shout "Mino!" and want to point it out, just simply beat them. ## Auto Player Bots Bots can be summoned to join a table. Currently this can only be done with commands. ``` /summon minopp:mino_auto_player ``` After summoning the bot, right click it and it'll search for and join a table near it. Shift + Right click it will open a menu that allows configuring its behavior. (Requires [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)) ## Rule variation Mino++ implemented the game slightly different than the official rule. - "Stacking Uno": A same draw card can be played over a draw card. - "Jump-In": If a player has exactly the same card as the top card of the discard pile, they may play it immediately, even if it is not their turn. - A Wild Draw Four card may only be played if the player holding it has no cards matching the current color. Otherwise, playing it is disallowed in a software fashion, and hence there's no challenge interaction on this.
